info.title: Inblog API
info.description:
Manage blog content using the Inblog API.

## 🚀 Getting Started

### 1. Get API Key
Get your API key from the dashboard:
1. Login to [Inblog Dashboard](https://inblog.com/dashboard)
2. Navigate to Settings → API Keys
3. Click "Create New API Key" button
4. Select required permission scopes
5. Store your API key securely

### 2. First Request
```bash
curl -X GET https://api.inblog.ai/api/v1/me \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"
```

### 3. Content-Type
- **Request**: `Content-Type: application/json` or `application/vnd.api+json`
- **Response**: `Content-Type: application/vnd.api+json`

## 📋 Key Features

- **Post Management**: Create, update, delete, and publish posts
- **Tags and Authors**: Manage categories and author information
- **Blog Settings**: Modify basic settings
- **URL Redirects**: Configure 307 (temporary) and 308 (permanent) redirects
- **JSON:API Standard**: Consistent response format

## 🔐 Authentication

All API requests require Bearer token authentication via Authorization header:

```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```
## 📚 Learn More

- [JSON:API Specification](https://jsonapi.org/)

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description:
## Authentication API
Check information about your currently active API key.

tags.name: Blogs
tags.description:
## Blogs API

Manage basic blog information and settings.

### Key Features
- Update blog name and description
- Configure timezone
- Set default language
- Manage logo and favicon URLs

tags.name: Posts
tags.description:
## Posts API

Create, update, delete, and publish blog posts.

### Key Features
- Create, read, and update posts
- Manage post status (draft, published, scheduled)

tags.name: Post Tags
tags.description:
## Post-Tag Relationships API

Manage relationships between posts and tags.

### Key Features
- Add tags to posts
- Remove tags from posts
- List tags for a post

tags.name: Post Authors
tags.description:
## Post-Author Relationships API

Manage relationships between posts and authors. A single post can have multiple authors.

### Key Features
- Add authors to posts
- Remove authors from posts
- List authors for a post

tags.name: Tags
tags.description:
## Tags API

Create and manage blog tags.

### Key Features
- Create, update, and delete tags

tags.name: Authors
tags.description:
## Authors API

View profile information for blog authors.

### Key Features

- View author profiles

tags.name: Redirects
tags.description:
## Redirects API

Configure and manage URL redirect rules.

### Key Features
- View redirect rules within your blog
- Configure 307 (temporary) / 308 (permanent) redirects

tags.name: Custom Domain
tags.description:
## Custom Domain API
Manage custom domain configuration for your blog.
### Key Features
- Add a custom domain
- Check domain DNS and verification status
- Remove a custom domain

tags.name: Custom UI
tags.description:
## Custom UI API
Manage blog banner and UI customization.
### Key Features
- Get current banner and UI settings
- Update banner image, title, colors, and navigation

tags.name: Search Console
tags.description:
## Search Console API
Connect and query Google Search Console data for your blog.
### Key Features
- OAuth-based Search Console connection
- Keyword performance data (clicks, impressions, CTR, position)
- Page-level search performance

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description:
## Analytics API
Access blog traffic analytics and performance metrics.
### Key Features
- Blog-wide traffic trends (daily/hourly)
- Per-post performance metrics (visits, clicks, organic, CVR)
- Traffic source analysis (referrers)
- Individual post traffic and sources

get.description:
Retrieve information and permissions for the currently active API key.

View connected blog and list of granted permissions.

Retrieve a list of published posts from the blog.
You can specify page number and size, and include tag or author information.

post.description:
Create a new blog post.

**Required Fields:**
- title: Post title
- slug: URL slug (must be unique within the blog)

**Image Processing:**
External image URLs are uploaded to Inblog R2 storage by default.
To preserve original URLs, use the `preserve_external_images=true` query parameter.

**Limitations:**
- The id field is not allowed. Post ID is generated automatically by the server.
- To update an existing post, use PATCH /posts/{id}.

**Response Codes:**
- 201: Post created successfully
- 400: Bad request (e.g., id field included)
- 409: Slug already exists

External image URLs will be automatically saved to Inblog storage.

parameters.name: preserve_external_images
parameters.description: Preserve external image URLs instead of uploading to R2 storage

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific post by ID.

patch.description:
Update the content and settings of an existing post.

**Image Processing:**
External image URLs are uploaded to Inblog R2 storage by default.
To preserve original URLs, use the `preserve_external_images=true` query parameter.

parameters.name: preserve_external_images
parameters.description: Preserve external image URLs instead of uploading to R2 storage

patch.description:
Publish a post immediately or schedule it for later.

**Supported Actions**:
- `publish` - Publish immediately
- `unpublish` - Unpublish
- `schedule` - Schedule publication (future time only)

get.description: Retrieve the list of tags associated with a post.

post.description:
Add one or more tags to a post.
Already connected tags are automatically skipped.

patch.description:
Replace all tags on a post with a new set of tags.
All existing tags are removed and only the newly specified tags remain.

delete.description: Remove a specific tag from a post.

get.description: Retrieve the list of authors associated with a post.

post.description:
Add one or more authors to a post.
Already connected authors are automatically skipped.

patch.description:
Replace all authors on a post with a new set of authors.
All existing authors are removed and only the newly specified authors remain.

delete.description: Remove a specific author from a post.

get.description: Retrieve all tags registered in the blog.

post.description:
Create a new tag.

**Required Fields:**
- name: Tag name
- slug: URL slug (must be unique within the blog)

**Response Codes:**
- 201: Tag created successfully
- 409: Slug already exists

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific tag by ID.

patch.description: Update a tag's name or other information.

get.description: Retrieve all author profiles registered in the blog.
Retrieve profile information for a specific author.

patch.description:
Update an author's profile information.

**Editable Fields:**
- author_name: Author display name
- avatar_url: Profile image URL

**Image Processing:**
Profile image URLs are uploaded to Inblog R2 storage by default.
To preserve original URLs, use the `preserve_external_images=true` query parameter.

parameters.name: preserve_external_images
parameters.description: Preserve external image URLs instead of uploading to R2 storage

get.description: Retrieve information about the blog connected to the current API key.

patch.description:
Update basic settings like blog name, description, logo, favicon, and featured image.

**Image Processing:**
Logo, favicon, and featured image URLs are uploaded to Inblog R2 storage by default.
To preserve original URLs, use the `preserve_external_images=true` query parameter.

parameters.name: preserve_external_images
parameters.description: Preserve external image URLs instead of uploading to R2 storage

get.description: Retrieve all URL redirect rules configured for the blog.

post.description:
Create a new redirect rule.
**Required Fields:** - from_path: Source path to redirect from - to_path: Target path to redirect to
**Response Codes:** - 201: Redirect created successfully - 409: from_path already exists

get.description: Retrieve detailed information for a specific redirect rule.

delete.description: Permanently delete a redirect rule. ⚠️ This action cannot be undone!

post.description: Add a custom domain to your blog. Returns domain configuration including Vercel DNS settings required for verification.

get.description: Check the current custom domain configuration and DNS verification status.

delete.description: Remove the custom domain from your blog. The blog will revert to the default subdomain.

get.description: Retrieve the current banner and UI customization settings for your blog.

patch.description: Update banner and UI customization settings. Only provided fields will be updated.

get.description: Get the Google OAuth URL for connecting Search Console. Use the optional redirect_uri parameter for CLI-based authentication flows.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Custom redirect URI for CLI callback

post.description: Exchange an OAuth authorization code for tokens to complete the Search Console connection.

get.description: Check whether Google Search Console is connected to your blog.

delete.description: Disconnect Google Search Console from your blog. Removes stored OAuth tokens.

get.description: Get keyword-level search performance data from Google Search Console. Returns clicks, impressions, CTR, and average position for each keyword.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 28 days ago.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 28 days ago.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 28 days ago.

get.description: Get per-post performance metrics including visits, clicks, organic traffic, and conversion rate.

parameters.name: start_date

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Set to "title" to include post titles in the response

parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 28 days ago.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

get.description: Get traffic data over time for a specific post with daily or hourly granularity.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 28 days ago.

get.description: Get traffic source analysis for a specific post showing referrer data.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 28 days ago.

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

bearerAuth.description:
Use API key as Bearer token.

Format: `Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY`

API keys can be generated from the Inblog dashboard.

IncludeParam.name: include
IncludeParam.description:
Specify related resources to include, separated by commas

Available values for Posts:
- `tags` - Post tags
- `authors` - Post authors

FilterSlugParam.name: filter[slug]
FilterSlugParam.description: Filter by slug. Returns only posts with an exact match.

FilterPublishedAtGteParam.name: filter[published_at_gte]
FilterPublishedAtGteParam.description: Return only posts published on or after this date. (ISO 8601 format)

FilterPublishedAtLteParam.name: filter[published_at_lte]
FilterPublishedAtLteParam.description: Return only posts published on or before this date. (ISO 8601 format)

FilterTagIdParam.name: filter[tag_id]
FilterTagIdParam.description: Return only posts with the specified tag.

FilterAuthorIdParam.name: filter[author_id]
FilterAuthorIdParam.description: Return only posts by the specified author.

type.description:
Resource type (required)
- posts, tags, authors etc.

id.description:
Resource ID (required)
- String format
- Must be unique within its type

**Important:** The example value (123) is a sample. For actual use:
- Get Tag IDs: `GET /v1/tags`
- Get Author IDs: `GET /v1/authors`

Using non-existent IDs will result in a 400 error.

scopes.description: List of permissions granted to API key

type.description:
Resource type identifier
- Fixed value according to JSON:API standard
- Always "posts"

title.description: Post title (recommended under 60 characters for SEO)

slug.description: URL-friendly unique identifier. Only letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed

json_ld_script.description:
Structured data in JSON-LD format (SEO optimization)
**What is JSON-LD?**
- JavaScript Object Notation for Linked Data
- Standard method for inserting structured data into web pages
- Uses Schema.org vocabulary to clearly define content information
**Key Benefits:**
- Search engines accurately understand content
- Enables Rich Snippets generation
- Displays additional information in search results (ratings, prices, images, etc.)
- Improves CTR (Click-Through Rate)
**Supported Types:**
- Article: Blog posts, news articles
- BlogPosting: Dedicated for blog posts
- HowTo: Tutorials, guides
- Recipe: Cooking recipes
- Product: Product information
- FAQPage: Frequently asked questions
- Event: Event, activity information
**Usage:**
- Both object and array formats are supported
- Automatically wrapped in <script type="application/ld+json"> tag
- Use array format to combine multiple types

relationships.description:
**How to link tags/authors:**
1. Get tag list via `GET /v1/tags`
2. Get author list via `GET /v1/authors`
3. Use the actual ID values from the response

**Note:** Using non-existent IDs or IDs not belonging to this blog will result in a 400 error.

- Used as SEO meta description
- Maximum 160 characters

1. Get tag list via `GET /v1/tags`
2. Get author list via `GET /v1/authors`
3. Use the actual ID values from the response

**Note:** Using non-existent IDs or IDs not belonging to this blog will result in a 400 error.

action.description:
Publication action type
- `publish`: Publish immediately
- `unpublish`: Unpublish
- `schedule`: Schedule publication

scheduled_at.description:
Scheduled publication time (ISO 8601 format)
Required only when action is 'schedule'
Must be a future time

type.description:
Resource type identifier
- Fixed value according to JSON:API standard
- Always "tags"

slug.description:
URL-friendly unique identifier
- Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed
- Can be automatically generated from name

name.description:
Tag name (required)
- Maximum 50 characters
- Must be unique

slug.description:
URL slug (required)
- Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed
- Must be unique

type.description:
Resource type identifier
- Fixed value according to JSON:API standard
- Always "authors"

author_name.description:
Author display name
- Name displayed on the blog
- Can use nickname or pen name

avatar_url.description:
Profile image URL
- Recommended to upload to Inblog storage
- Ratio: 1:1 (square)
- Recommended size: 400x400px

oneOf.description: Profile image URL (external URLs are uploaded to Inblog storage by default)
Base64 data URL (max 10MB, always uploaded to Inblog storage)
Profile image URL (external URLs are uploaded to Inblog storage by default)

- JSON:API 표준에 따른 고정값
- 항상 "blogs"

description.example: Stories about web development and programming

logo.description:
Logo image URL
- Recommended size: 200x50px (landscape)
- Transparent background PNG recommended

favicon.description:
Favicon URL
- Size: 32x32px or 64x64px
- ICO or PNG format

og_image.description:
Open Graph featured image URL
- Image displayed when sharing on social media
- Recommended size: 1200x630px

blog_language.description:
Blog language code (ISO 639-1)
- Default: ko (Korean)
- Used in HTML lang attribute

timezone_diff.description:
Time difference from UTC (in hours)
- Korea: 9 (UTC+9)
- Japan: 9 (UTC+9)
- US Eastern: -5 (UTC-5)

plan.description:
Subscription plan (read-only)
- free: Free plan
- team: Team plan
- enterprise: Enterprise plan

type.description:
Resource type identifier
- Fixed value according to JSON:API standard
- Always "redirects"

from_path.description:
Source path (redirect source)
- Must start with /
- Must be unique
- Wildcards not supported

to_path.description:
Target path (redirect destination)
- Must start with /
- External URLs also allowed (http:// or https://)

redirect_type.description:
Redirect type
- 307: Temporary Redirect
- 308: Permanent Redirect

verified.description: Whether the domain DNS has been verified

vercel_configuration.description: Vercel DNS configuration details for domain verification

configured.description: Whether a custom domain is configured

verified.description: Whether the domain DNS has been verified

The redirect URI used during the OAuth flow

date.description: Date or datetime of the data point

count.description: Number of visits from this source

date.description: Date or datetime of the data point

start_date.description: Start date of the data range

end_date.description: End date of the data range
